name: @univerjs/docs-mention-ui
description: Vendored build of @univerjs/docs-mention-ui@0.25.0 (Apache-2.0, from the univer-revamp fork). Not published to the public npm registry, but the @casualoffice/sheets SDK lazy-imports it for the comment @-mention plugin. Vendored here so <CasualSheets> mounts with its full plugin set. Imports @univerjs/core/design/docs/docs-ui/ui as externals — they resolve to doc-hub's installed 0.25.0, so DI singletons stay shared.
